channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Why Tesla may be spared from Trump’s auto tariffs
item.description: As the global auto world reeled from the potential fallout of Donald Trump‘s new auto tariffs, one name stood out as less affected than others—electric-vehicle maker Tesla. The Texas-based company’s shares were the rare automotive stock to trade in the green in U.S.
item.dc:creator: Reuters, Fast Company

item.title: What is 'classified' information? What are 'secure' communications? Here's a primer
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The Trump administration's use of a popular messaging app to discuss sensitive military plans — with a journalist on the text chain — is raising questions about security and the importance of safeguarding the nation's secrets.
item.dc:creator: DAVID KLEPPER, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: The ‘New York Times’’s copyright lawsuit against OpenAI can proceed, says a federal judge
item.description: A federal judge has ruled that The New York Times and other newspapers can proceed with a copyright lawsuit against OpenAI and Microsoft seeking to end the practice of using their stories to train artificial intelligence chatbots. U.S.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: What’s an email mask? Here’s why tech experts say you should be using one
item.description: You’ve heard of burner phones. What about burner email? So much of the internet now requires that you hand over your email address before you’re able to use any services—from an app you’ve downloaded to signing up for a newsletter or redeeming a special offer online.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: Los Angeles sheriff's department to retest 4,000 DNA samples after using faulty kits for 8 months
item.description: The Los Angeles County Sheriff’s Department says it will retest 4,000 DNA samples and open an internal investigation after learning that it used potentially flawed test kits for eight months.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: The Apple Watch faces a wearables wake-up call
item.description: Apple Watch sales are enduring a years-long backslide. While Apple first launched its watch in 2015, sales didn’t spike until the pandemic, when consumers were highly focused on their health.
item.dc:creator: Henry Chandonnet, Fast Company

item.title: Everything new on Netflix in April 2025 – including Black Mirror season 7 and Love on the Spectrum
item.description: Excited for Black Mirror season 7? It's just one of the many new movies and shows arriving on Netflix in April 2025.
item.dc:creator: rowan.davies@futurenet.com (Rowan Davies), TechRadar

item.title: Figure skating embraces the future with new technology, modern concepts to engage athletes and fans
item.description: BOSTON (AP) — Ashley Wagner and Ben Agosto know what it's like to step off the ice at the figure skating world championships and feel as though they've conquered the sport. And what it feels like when the notoriously fickle sport bites back.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: ClickFix malware tricks you into infecting your own Windows PC
item.description: Hackers are tricking people into installing password-stealing malware by making them press keyboard shortcuts under the pretense of proving they're not bots.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Intergalactic: The Heretic Prophet reportedly won't release until after 2026, as Neil Druckmann says that staff 'are playing it at the office' right now - but I don't think I can wait that long
item.description: Naughty Dog's next game, Intergalactic: The Heretic Prophet, reportedly won't launch until after 2026.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Lies of P Overture won't elaborate on the game's eyebrow-raising post-credits twist, and I think that's good news
item.description: I'm actually glad that Lies of P's Overture DLC won't tie into the base game's shocking post-credits twist.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: iPadOS 19: 4 rumored new features, and 2 I’d like to see
item.description: iPadOS 19 is still quite a ways off, but we’ve already heard some key rumors about Apple’s next tablet operating system update – and it’s more than just iOS on the big screen.
item.dc:creator: jamie.richards@futurenet.com (Jamie Richards), TechRadar

item.title: Los CIO están dando un paso adelante como estrategas empresariales
item.description: El papel del director de sistemas de la información (CIO, por sus siglas en inglés), que antes era estrictamente técnico y se limitaba a gestionar las necesidades internas de una organización, ha experimentado un cambio tectónico masivo.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: La Policía de Valencia suma la IA a sus filas para mejorar la respuesta ante catástrofes como la DANA
item.description: El 29 de octubre del ya caduco 2024 una DANA arrasó Valencia sembrando la desolación a lo largo y ancho del territorio. La destrucción se adueñó de la región dejando cicatrices aún patentes en la sociedad a día de hoy.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Teams successful on 52.2% of ball/strike challenges during spring training robot umpire test
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Teams won 52.2% of their ball/strike challenges during the spring training test of robot umpires, and catchers had a markedly better success rate than pitchers.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Support for TikTok ban plunged over past 2 years: Poll
item.description: The number of Americans who support banning TikTok has fallen dramatically over the past two years, according to a new poll.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: Red Hat’s AI portfolio evolves to address enterprise deployment challenges
item.description: Red Hat announced updates to Red Hat OpenShift AI and Red Hat Enterprise Linux AI (RHEL AI), with a goal of addressing the high costs and technical complexity of scaling AI beyond pilot projects into full deployment.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: The Apple rumor machine cranks into gear for iOS 19
item.description: WWDC event marketing intensifies, and as we head toward that event in a little over two months, it looks as if we’re being told to expect a new paint job (aka user interface change)s for iOS.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: The secret to using generative AI effectively
item.description: Do you think generative AI (genAI) sucks? I did. The hype around everything genAI has been over the top and ridiculous for a while now. Especially at the start, most of the tools were flashy, but quickly fell apart if you tried to use them for any serious work purposes.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: DoD shepherds CMMC through Trump deregulatory initiative
item.description: The Trump administration has a '10 out, one in' rule for new regulations, but DoD officials are confident they can finalize the CMMC requirements soon. The post DoD shepherds CMMC through Trump deregulatory initiative first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Justin Doubleday, Federal News Network

item.title: Senate confirms Michael Kratsios to lead White House science, tech office
item.description: The Senate confirmed Michael Kratsios to head the White House’s Office of Science and Technology Policy (OSTP) with bipartisan support. Kratsios, who was Trump’s chief technology officer during his first White House term, was approved Tuesday by the upper chamber in a 74-25 vote.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, The Hill

item.title: Napster sold to tech commerce company for $207 million
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — A brand that was notoriously connected to music piracy before reemerging as a subscription music service has been sold to Infinite Reality for $207 million.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: 5 big takeaways from Nvidia GTC
item.description: Now that the dust has settled from Nvidia’s GTC 2025, a few industry experts weighed in on some core big picture developments from the conference.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Waymo plans to bring its driverless taxis to Washington in 2026
item.description: Waymo on Tuesday added Washington to its pioneering robotaxi service's steadily expanding list of U.S. markets, although passengers will have to wait until next year until they can take a driverless ride around the nation's capital city.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL LIEDTKE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Protect your genetic data: Urgent steps after 23andMe bankruptcy
item.description: Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson says 23andMe's bankruptcy raises data privacy fears: Opt out, download and delete data now.
item.dc:creator: Fox News
